message:
feat(scheduler): add comprehensive test suite for scheduler wakeup (bd-3ce8)

Add 60+ unit tests for scheduler lost wakeup detection and prevention:

Parker tests:
- Basic park/unpark sequences
- Permit model (unpark before park)
- Multiple unpark coalescing
- Timeout expiry and interruption
- Parker reuse after wake
- Lost wakeup detection
- Concurrent unpark safety
- Spurious wakeup handling

Work stealing tests:
- Steal from busy/empty workers
- Skip empty queues efficiently
- Visit all queues fairly
- Contention without deadlock
- Deterministic with same seed

Local queue tests:
- Push/pop LIFO ordering
- Steal batch (half of queue)
- Stealer clone behavior
- High volume operations
- Mixed push/pop patterns

Global queue tests:
- FIFO ordering
- Multi-producer safety
- High contention handling

Priority scheduler tests:
- Three-lane strict ordering
- Priority within lanes
- Steal only from ready lane
- Pop-only methods
- Remove and clear operations

Stress tests (marked #[ignore]):
- Parker high contention (50 threads, 1000 cycles)
- Inject while parking race
- Work stealing fairness
- Global queue contention (50 producers, 10 consumers)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
